headline: Nvidia is still an AI powerhouse as chip stocks rally in April
summary: Shares of chip giant Nvidia (NVDA) are on a tear in the month of April after a wobbly March. Great Hill Capital chairman Thomas Hayes joins Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Ines Ferré to examine Nvidia's current position in the AI semiconductor space.
